_description: Demo conversation scenarios for the Conversion Engine. Each scenario drives real interpret_reply() + route_decision() pipeline calls with kill switch active.

scenarios.description: Skeptical signal challenge resolves to a booking. Demonstrates QUESTION → clarification → INTERESTED → SEND_CAL_LINK flow.

replies.text: Your hiring data looks stale — those roles were backfill, not growth. We're not scaling aggressively.
replies.note: Signal challenge — must route to clarification, never STOP on a factual dispute.

replies.text: Fair point. Honestly our ML capacity has been the bottleneck for the past quarter. Let's talk.
replies.note: Self-disclosure buying signal after clarification — should immediately route to Cal link.

scenarios.description: Bench depth question followed by SMS scheduling. Demonstrates QUESTION → SEND_EMAIL, then SCHEDULE → SEND_CAL_LINK + SMS warm-lead leg.

replies.text: Interesting — what's your bench depth for Python ML engineers specifically? We need people who know inference pipelines.
replies.note: Capacity/bench question — must route to SEND_EMAIL with honest bench disclosure, not SEND_CAL_LINK.

replies.text: Good, that bench sounds relevant. Texting is easier for me — send the scheduling link that way.
replies.note: Warm lead requesting SMS scheduling — triggers both email Cal link AND SMS fallback leg.

scenarios.description: New VP Engineering reassessing vendors 60 days into role — narrow high-conversion window. Demonstrates immediate INTERESTED → SEND_CAL_LINK routing.

replies.text: I'm 60 days into the role and I already know we need to move fast on scaling the ML platform — our bench is thin. Let's get 30 minutes to see if there's a fit.
replies.note: Segment 3 — self-disclosure (bench is thin) + explicit scheduling ask. Should route directly to SEND_CAL_LINK.

scenarios.description: ICP disqualifier fired at brief generation (anti-offshore + consumer app). Prospect confirms explicitly. Demonstrates NOT_INTERESTED → STOP with HubSpot UNQUALIFIED status.

replies.text: We keep all engineering in-house — this isn't relevant to us.
replies.note: Clean explicit rejection — must STOP and mark UNQUALIFIED in HubSpot. No follow-up allowed.
